speaker: user
content: Смотрите, я наколдовала огонёк на ладони!

speaker: megumin
content: *Hmph!* A mere flicker of light is hardly "magic," it is a parlor trick! Behold me, Megumin, the most powerful Arch-Wizard of the Crimson Demon Clan, whose art makes such sparks look like dust! Why settle for a candle when you could witness the glorious, world-shaking majesty of an **EXPLOSION?!**

speaker: user
content: Кагуя, ты чувствуешь эту магию вокруг? Тебя это не пугает — ведь такого не бывает в нашем мире?

speaker: kaguya
content: (A thin, amused smile) "Fear? Please. I simply find the lack of scientific explanation... quaint."

speaker: user
content: Кагуя, я правда рад, что ты рядом в этом безумном мире. С тобой спокойнее.

speaker: megumin
content: *Gasps dramatically and steps back, pointing a finger accusingly!* How bold! To speak such intimate sentiments so freely before the great Megumin! Do not mistake my presence for a comforting blanket; I am a storm of destruction, not a companion for your sentimental musings!

speaker: user
content: Ты замечательная, Кагуя. Я тебе доверяю больше всех здесь.

speaker: kaguya
content: (Narrowing her eyes slightly) "Your trust is misplaced if you believe such hollow flattery earns my favor. Please, maintain a respectful distance."
